prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data beyond my last training update, nor can I perform financial analysis or predict future stock prices. The point estimate uses the current provided price as a neutral baseline. The confidence intervals are heuristic estimates reflecting general stock market volatility for a stock like QCOM over a 20-day period, without any specific analytical basis, historical data, or forward-looking indicators. These figures should not be considered financial advice.
